training_status: active, building muscle during weight loss phase

benefits.description: Lost 35lbs total over 3 months of weight loss journey, 2 months on reta
Very noticeable hunger suppression at 1mg, averaging 2100 cal/day; later increased to 2300-2400 cal/day suggesting slight reduction in effect
Gained a good amount of muscle while on weight loss phase, hasn't lost any muscle

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg, titrated to 0.75mg after 2 weeks, then to 1mg after another 2 weeks, stayed at 1mg. Planning to increase dose soon as appetite suppression has slightly diminished. Diet described as 'spot on'. Commenter BigBackInTheShadows implies OP may also be running test and tren, though OP does not explicitly confirm this.
